summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. The shard is not a dedupe cluster, so no shared canonical was invented; useful contributor or maintainer PRs are kept open or routed to maintainer judgment where required.

actions.reason: Focused ACP behavior change with failing proof and unresolved review-bot findings requires maintainer technical judgment; no close, merge, or fix PR is allowed in this job.
Useful focused fix candidate related to the open #87387 issue; keep open for normal review rather than closing or merging from this inventory shard.
The PR is small and relevant, but the proposed CI smoke can produce false green results and proof is failing; maintainer judgment is needed before any close or label action.
Related useful contributor PR in an active multi-PR fix family; keep open rather than closing from this shard.
Maintainer-owned focused QQBot behavior change is ready for maintainer review; no automated close, merge, or label mutation should be planned.
